items.title: Sinner advances to Italian Open final vs. Ruud
items.summary: Jannik Sinner overcame Mother Nature and Daniil Medvedev to advance to Sunday's Italian Open final against Casper Ruud.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Sources: Alonso agrees to become Chelsea coach
items.summary: Xabi Alonso is set to be confirmed as Chelsea head coach within the next 24 hours, sources have told ESPN, after agreeing to terms to take charge at Stamford Bridge.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: The Minnesota Timberwolves’ motley crew brought a burst of fun to the NBA playoffs
